channel.title: D365 F&O Tech Blog
channel.description: Recent content on D365 F&O Tech Blog

item.title: Create an Event Handler in X++ for Dynamics 365 F&O
item.description: How to properly intercept a standard event in D365 F&O without changing standard code, with a concrete example on the SalesTable.

item.title: About Me
item.description:
I am a freelance technical architect for Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations, and this blog gathers my technical notes, tutorials, and experience reports on the Microsoft ecosystem:

  • X++ Development — extensions, event handlers, Chain of Command, batch jobs
  • Power Platform — Power Automate, Power Apps, custom connectors
  • Integrations — Data Entities, Dual-write, Azure Logic Apps
  • DevOps & Admin — Azure DevOps, LCS, environment management

The goal: concrete, tested posts with reusable code — not just theory copied from official documentation.
